bits.text: India won the ICC Champions Trophy 2025 by defeating New Zealand in the final.
Neeraj Chopra set a new national record in javelin throw with 90.18m.
IPL 2026 auction saw the highest-ever bid of ₹28 crore for a player.
India's Union Budget 2026-27 introduced zero income tax up to ₹12 lakh.
G20 summit 2026 to be hosted by South Africa in Johannesburg.
ISRO successfully launched Chandrayaan-4 lunar sample return mission.
NASA's Artemis III mission scheduled for late 2026.
India's first quantum computing chip developed by IIT Madras researchers.
India launched its own semiconductor fabrication plant in Gujarat.
OpenAI released GPT-5 with multimodal reasoning capabilities.
India's GDP growth rate projected at 7.2% for FY 2026-27.
Sensex crossed 95,000 mark for the first time.
RBI kept repo rate unchanged at 6.25% in the latest monetary policy review.
Delhi AQI crossed 450, schools shut for 3 days.
India pledged to achieve net-zero carbon emissions by 2070 at COP31.
India became a permanent member of the UN Security Council reform committee.
EU passed the AI Act — world's first comprehensive AI regulation.
FIFA announced the 2030 World Cup to be hosted across six countries.
PV Sindhu won gold at the All England Open Badminton Championships.
Scientists discovered high-temperature superconductor at room pressure.
India's LIGO detector in Maharashtra detected gravitational waves independently.
One Nation One Election bill introduced in Parliament.
India signed free trade agreement with the European Union.
Apple announced the Vision Pro 2 with neural interface support.
India's UPI processed 20 billion transactions in February 2026.
India surpassed Japan to become the 4th largest economy by GDP.
Rupee strengthened to ₹82.5 against USD after FDI inflow surge.
India's green hydrogen production reached 1 million tonnes annually.
